title: Class Profile
description: One specific section or block. Inherits from course profile; overrides anything class-specific.

section_id.description: Short identifier used in filenames and logs. e.g. 'careers8_block1'

course_id.description: Must match a course_id in profiles/courses/.

class_type.description: mainstream = standard academic class; intervention = targeted support class; designated_program = class built around student designations.

primary_designations.description: BC Ministry designation codes that describe most students in this class.

lesson_length_minutes.description: Overrides teacher profile default if set.

teaching_mode.description: Overrides teacher profile default for this class.

project.description: Active project anchor for this class. When set, generated content references the project context.

name.description: Full project name as it appears in student-facing content.

short_id.description: Slug used in filenames and cross-references.

description.description: What the project is — used to ground generation context.

current_phase.description: Which phase is active now. Must match an entry in phases if phases is set.

generation_overrides.description: Explicit overrides to course-level generation defaults for this class only.

notes.description: Free-text notes about this class that should inform generation — dynamics, what works, what doesn't.
